Southern Africa

Zambia Travel Guide

Best for travelers who want deeper safari immersion and less processed camp experiences.

General information about Zambia

Zambia is revered for walking safaris, strong wildlife density, and a rugged sense of authenticity on the Zambezi and Luangwa systems.

Getting around

Livingstone and Lusaka are the most practical gateways for Zambezi and Luangwa-based circuits.

Best time to visit

June to October is the classic dry-season safari window, especially for South Luangwa and Lower Zambezi.

Planning notes

Use this country page to compare attractions, understand how to move between them, and decide whether the trip works best as a standalone route or part of a broader regional circuit.
